oidcServiceAuthorizationDetailsTypes.documentation: RFC 9396 — global allowlist of authorization_details `type` values (comma-separated). Empty = no global restriction (per-RP allowlist still applies).

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsAuthorizationDetail.documentation: RFC 9396 — accept authorization_details parameter from this RP
RFC 9396 — per-RP allowlist of authorization_details `type` values (comma-separated). Empty = inherit global only.

RFC 9396 — per-`type` Perl rules, encoded as a JSON object `{"<type>": "<perl_expression>"}`. Key: authorization_details `type` identifier (RFC 6749 token charset). Value: Perl expression evaluated when an entry of that type is requested. Receives the user session attributes plus the magic variable `$detail` (full hashref of the entry). Truthy result grants the entry, falsy rejects it. A type that has no rule entry is permitted (subject to the type allowlist). Empty string = no rules.
